_comment: Loadable graph fixture. Matches fixture_loader.load_graph_from_json shape. Concepts have explicit IDs so tests can assert on stable identifiers. Weights reflect the bias you'd see after extraction+reinforcement: strong decision edges, medium support edges, weak tangent edges.

concepts.name: Kuzu
concepts.description: Embedded graph DB with Cypher and temporal properties
concepts.source_quote: look at Kuzu. It's embedded, Cypher-native, and supports temporal properties on edges

concepts.name: SQLite
concepts.description: Row store considered and rejected as KG backend
concepts.source_quote: SQLite with two timestamp columns would work, but I'm worried about query ergonomics

concepts.name: Bitemporal Knowledge Graph
concepts.description: Graph with valid_time and transaction_time per edge
concepts.source_quote: I need a store for a bitemporal knowledge graph

concepts.name: KG store choice
concepts.description: Which backend for the knowledge graph layer
concepts.source_quote: Decision: going with Kuzu for the KG layer

concepts.name: ChromaDB
concepts.source_quote: I'll keep ChromaDB for vector embeddings

concepts.name: ConceptStore (legacy)
concepts.description: Deprecated SQLite store, migration guard in place
concepts.source_quote: SQLite stays only for the legacy ConceptStore until migration is done

concepts.name: Graphiti / Zep
concepts.description: Prior art for temporal KG split
concepts.source_quote: matches how Graphiti and most temporal KG systems structure things
